Employee - Class in com.unimib.assignment3.POJO
Represents an employee in the system.

Protected no-args constructor required by JPA.
Employee(String, String) - Constructor for class com.unimib.assignment3.POJO.Employee
Constructs an employee with default role EmployeeRole.JUNIOR and its salary.
Employee(String, String, double, EmployeeRole) - Constructor for class com.unimib.assignment3.POJO.Employee
Constructs an employee with a specific role and monthly salary.
Employee(String, String, EmployeeRole) - Constructor for class com.unimib.assignment3.POJO.Employee
Constructs an employee with a specific role and its default salary.
